reqParams.name: country
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code, in uppercase e.g 'SE', 'DK', 'NO'.

reqParams.name: organisation
reqParams.description: Details of the organisation.

reqParams.name: corporateId
reqParams.description: Provide the corporate ID of the respective merchant.

reqParams.name: legalName
reqParams.description: The legal name of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: mccCode
reqParams.description: Merchant Category Code (MCC) of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: address
reqParams.description: The address of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: careOf
reqParams.description: Name of the addressee that is accepting the correspondence for the intended recipient.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: Address of the organisation.

reqParams.name: addressLine2
reqParams.description: Address of the organisation.

reqParams.name: addressLine3
reqParams.description: Address of the organisation.

reqParams.name: city
reqParams.description: City where the organisation is located.

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the country where the organization is located.

reqParams.name: postalCode
reqParams.description: Postal code of the organisation.

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Contact number of the organisation in code and number format.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code identifying the country or region.

reqParams.name: number
reqParams.description: Phone number.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Email address of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: multiMerchantId
reqParams.description: The multi merchant ID in case this merchant should belong to a multiMerchant setup.

reqParams.name: controlFields
reqParams.description: These fields allow you to control the behavior of the API by adding additional actions or controlling the default execution path of the API call.

reqParams.name: displayProducts
reqParams.description: Allows the customization of product display for onboarding merchants. Specify a set of Product IDs (e.g. terminals, accessories) to be shown.

reqParams.name: productId
reqParams.description: Represents the product ID of a product selected for delivery to the merchant.

reqParams.name: pricingPlans
reqParams.description: A list of strings specifying the billing plan for a merchant. This allows you to set up a plan based on the monthly price for a terminal and the duration in months. The specific plan details are provided by Surfboard.

reqParams.name: acquirerConfig
reqParams.description: Configuration for acquirer settings. This is mandatory for PF partners and Direct merchants.

reqParams.name: acquirer
reqParams.description: Name of the acquirer (e.g., 'nets', 'swedbank').

reqParams.name: acquirerMID
reqParams.description: Acquirer Merchant ID for transaction processing.

reqParams.name: showProductCatalogue
reqParams.description: Toggles the visibility of the product catalogue during the Web KYB process. Defaults to false if not specified.

reqParams.name: merchantConfig
reqParams.description: Configuration settings for the merchant.

reqParams.name: settlementFrequency
reqParams.description: Settlement frequency for the merchant payments.

reqParams.name: serviceProvider
reqParams.description: Array of service provider configurations for the merchant.

reqParams.name: serviceProviderId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the service provider.

reqParams.name: deductApplicableTransactionFee
reqParams.description: Whether to deduct applicable transaction fees.

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Fee structure for the service provider.

reqParams.name: percentage
reqParams.description: Percentage-based fee.

reqParams.name: fixed
reqParams.description: Fixed fee amount.

reqParams.name: adjustmentTypes
reqParams.description: Array of adjustment types for the fee structure.

reqParams.name: transactionPricingPlan
reqParams.description: Specifies the billing plan based on which transaction cost is calculated for a merchant. If more than one billing plan exists it is mandatory to send in this value.

reqParams.name: paymentMethods
reqParams.description: Configuration for payment methods to be enabled for the merchant.

reqParams.name: card
reqParams.description: Card payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for card payments.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: Merchant ID for card payments.

reqParams.name: scheme
reqParams.description: Array of supported card schemes.

reqParams.name: amex
reqParams.description: American Express payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: American Express Merchant ID. Required when configuring AMEX payment method.

reqParams.name: swish
reqParams.description: Swedish mobile payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for Swish payments.

reqParams.name: swishNumber
reqParams.description: Optional Swish number for the payment method configuration.

reqParams.name: klarna
reqParams.description: Buy now, pay later payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for Klarna payments.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: Klarna Merchant ID for the payment method configuration.

reqParams.name: klarnaPricingPlan
reqParams.description: Klarna pricing plan configuration.

reqParams.name: username
reqParams.description: Klarna account username. Required when configuring KLARNA payment method.

reqParams.name: password
reqParams.description: Klarna account password. Required when configuring KLARNA payment method.

reqParams.name: b2binv
reqParams.description: B2B invoice payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for B2B invoice payments.

reqParams.name: clientId
reqParams.description: Client ID for B2B invoice payment method.

reqParams.name: clientSecretKey
reqParams.description: Client secret key for B2B invoice payment method.

reqParams.name: acc2acc
reqParams.description: Account to account transfer payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for account-to-account payments.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: Merchant ID for account to account transfers.

reqParams.name: svipps
reqParams.description: Norwegian mobile payment method. Set to true to enable Vipps payment method.

reqParams.name: smobilepay
reqParams.description: Danish mobile payment method. Set to true to enable MobilePay payment method.

reqParams.name: preSelectProducts
reqParams.description: A set of products that are pre-selected by you for the merchant. These products are shipped as part of the onboarding process without further input from the merchant.

reqParams.name: productId
reqParams.description: Represents the product ID of a product selected for delivery to the merchant.

reqParams.name: quantity
reqParams.description: Quantity of the product

reqParams.name: pricingPlanId
reqParams.description: Specifies the billing plan for a merchant. This allows you to set up a plan based on the monthly price for a terminal and the duration in months. The specific plan details are provided by Surfboard.

reqParams.name: redirectUrl
reqParams.description: This will be the redirect URL from the web kyb page, once the application is submitted the user can choose to redirect to the provided URL.

reqParams.name: generateShortLink
reqParams.description: Set as true when you need the short URL for the web kyb page. Default is set to false.

reqParams.name: store
reqParams.description: Input the store details if you also want to create a store for the merchant.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Name of the store.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Email address of the store.

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Contact number of the store in code and number format.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code identifying the country or region.

reqParams.name: number
reqParams.description: A string of numbers ranging from 0-9 with a length of 5-15 characters.

reqParams.name: address
reqParams.description: The address of the store.

reqParams.name: careOf
reqParams.description: Name of the addressee that is accepting the correspondence for the intended recipient.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: Address of the store.

reqParams.name: addressLine2
reqParams.description: Address of the store.

reqParams.name: addressLine3
reqParams.description: Address of the store.

reqParams.name: city
reqParams.description: City where the store is located.

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the country where the store is located.

reqParams.name: postalCode
reqParams.description: Postal code of the store.

reqParams.name: onlineInfo
reqParams.description: In order to start accepting online payments you need to create an online store which requires some additional properties such as the following.

reqParams.name: merchantWebshopURL
reqParams.description: This is the web-shop URL of the merchant.

reqParams.name: paymentPageHostURL
reqParams.description: This is the URL of the payment page. This is required for integrating online payments using SDK mode.

reqParams.name: termsAndConditionsURL
reqParams.description: This is the URL of the T&C of the merchant’s web-shop, it has to contain the refund policy.

reqParams.name: privacyPolicyURL
reqParams.description: This is the URL of the privacy policy of the merchant.

reqParams.name: googlePayMerchantId
reqParams.description: This is the Google Pay merchant ID of the merchant.

reqParams.name: preEnteredInformation
reqParams.description: Use this param to pre fill the merchant application

reqParams.name: openingInfo
reqParams.description: These details helps us understand when payments are accepted for the merchant.

reqParams.name: isSeasonalOpen
reqParams.description: If they are a seasonal merchant, open only on select seasons.

reqParams.name: monthsOpen
reqParams.description: If they are a seasonal merchant, mention the months they will be open for payments. e.g., Seasonal shops open only during january and map can be mentioned as [1,5]

reqParams.name: isOpenAllYear
reqParams.description: If merchant will be accepting payments all year round.

reqParams.name: isStoreOpenAtNight
reqParams.description: Mention if merchant stores are open all night.

reqParams.name: reasonForOpeningAtNight
reqParams.description: Provide a reason as to why they are open all night. Mandatory when 'isStoreOpenAtNight' is set to true.

reqParams.name: giftcards
reqParams.description: Gift card details of the merchant if any.

reqParams.name: amountPerYear
reqParams.description: Estimated amount spent using gift cards per year.

reqParams.name: averageValidDays
reqParams.description: Average validity of gift card provided by merchant.

reqParams.name: prePayments
reqParams.description: Details of pre payment option provided by merchant

reqParams.name: averageDeliveryTimeInDays
reqParams.description: Average delivery time in days taken after pre payment.

reqParams.name: salesPercentPerYear
reqParams.description: Percentage of sales revenue generated via pre payment.

reqParams.name: fundsInfo
reqParams.description: Sales information with respect to the merchant.

reqParams.name: estimatedAmountPerYear
reqParams.description: Estimated amount of sales per year.

reqParams.name: priceOfMostExpensiveItemSold
reqParams.description: Price of most expensive item.

reqParams.name: averageTransactionValuePerDay
reqParams.description: Estimated amount of sales per day.

reqParams.name: estimatedAmountPerTransaction
reqParams.description: Average amount per transaction.

reqParams.name: estimatedFrequencyOfTransactions
reqParams.description: Denotes how often transactions are made under merchant. Possible values are 'DAILY', 'WEEKLY', 'MONTHLY', 'YEARLY'

reqParams.name: estimatedNoOfDailyTransactions
reqParams.description: Average number of sales per day. Mandatory when 'estimatedFrequencyOfTransactions' is set to 'DAILY'

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: This is the applicationId that you will use to track the status of the create merchant request.

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: This is the link for the KYC session created for the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: For PF partners, merchant is created and the merchantId is returned.

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: For PF partners, store is created and the storeId is returned.

resParams.name: shortLinkUrl
resParams.description: Short URL of the web kyb page if generateShortLink is set to true.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

steps.name: Check Application Status
steps.description: Check the status of the application

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: The Application ID of the respective merchant returned by the Create Merchant API.

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: This is the link for the KYC session created for the merchant, which can be fetched for applications in state 'APPLICATION_INITIATED' or 'APPLICATION_PENDING_INFORMATION'. This URL will be returned for ISV(Independent Software Vendors) partners only.

resParams.name: applicationStatus
resParams.description: Describes the status of the application. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: The application has been created, and the Web KYB URL has been generated. The merchant is now required to fill in necessary information through the Web KYB.
The merchant has finished filling in the Web KYB and submitted it for processing.
The application is still under processing, and additional data is required from the merchant.
Both the merchant signatories and UBOs have signed the application.
The application has been processed and rejected.
The application has been processed and accepted. It is now pending merchant creation and onboarding.
Each application is valid for 30 days. If there is no action during these 30 days, the KYB is treated as session expired.
The merchant account has been created. At this stage, the Merchant ID and Store ID will be returned in the status call.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Merchant ID of the created merchant is returned when application status is 'MERCHANT_CREATED'

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: Store ID of the store created under the merchant is returned when application status is 'MERCHANT_CREATED'

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
